ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., manual, ASOS, satellite, radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that recorded the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was recorded */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow, sleet) */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth in cm */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the forecast is for */,
  "temp" REAL /* Forecast temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Forecast feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Forecast relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Forecast wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecast wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Forecast wind gust speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Forecast atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Forecast rainfall in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Forecasted percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Forecasted visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Forecasted UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Forecasted air quality index */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Forecasted type of precipitation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Forecasted snow depth in cm */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Forecasted soil moisture level */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Forecasted soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_forecast_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("forecast_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the warning is for */,
  "warning_time" TEXT /* Time the warning was issued */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g. flood, storm, heat) */,
  "warning_text" TEXT /* Text of the warning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the warning is no longer valid */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the potential impact of the warning */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for the public and agencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that recorded the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was recorded */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Historical percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Historical visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Historical UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Historical air quality index */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Historical type of precipitation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Historical snow depth in cm */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Historical soil moisture level */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Historical soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that recorded the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was recorded */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in mm */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Historical percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Historical visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Historical UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Historical air quality index */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Historical type of precipitation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Historical snow depth in cm */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Historical soil moisture level */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Historical soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "imagery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite that captured the image */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the image was captured */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Binary data for the satellite image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of satellite image (e.g., visible, infrared, water vapor) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, TIFF) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imagery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_data" (
  "radar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar reading */,
  "radar_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radar station that captured the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was captured */,
  "radar_data" TEXT /* Binary data for the radar reading */,
  "radar_type" TEXT /* Type of radar (e.g., Doppler, phased array) */,
  "radar_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the radar data */,
  "radar_range" REAL /* Range of the radar in km */,
  "radar_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the radar in GHz */,
  "radar_description" TEXT /* Description of the radar data content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the weather model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather model */,
  "model_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather model (e.g., GFS, ECMWF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "forecast_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the forecast is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the forecast is for */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the weather model used for the forecast */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather model used for the forecast */,
  "model_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, user) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the alert is for */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g. storm, heat, flood) */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Time until the alert is no longer valid */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the potential impact of the alert */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for the public and agencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
